title: ScriptureFlow Bible Data output
description: Links to the default dataset rows and run summary produced by the Actor.

results.title: Dataset results
results.description: Translation, catalog summary, book metadata, verse, validation, or structured error rows written to the default dataset.

summary.title: Run summary
summary.description: OUTPUT_SUMMARY.json in the default key-value store with status, row count, warnings, errors, and catalogSummary details when that mode is used.
